# update-supabase-function-slugs-and-config
Description: Renames Supabase function directories and updates the `config.toml` file to reflect new slugs and JWT verification settings.
Source: project
1. Identify the Supabase function directories that need renaming to match the desired slug format (e.g., `app-slug-function-name`).
2. Rename the local function directories accordingly.
3. Open the `supabase/config.toml` file.
4. For each renamed function, update its entry in `config.toml` to use the new slug.
5. Configure the `verify_jwt` setting for each function as required (e.g., `verify_jwt = false` for webhooks, `verify_jwt = true` for others).
6. Commit and push the changes to your repository.
7. Pull the latest changes on your self-hosted server to apply the updates.
